emails.subject: Re: EESI deal #536810
emails.body: Re: EESI deal #536810 Yes, deal should have zero volume. Looks like Jeremy just didn't have time to kill it so he zeroed it out. I'll kill it, but in the meantime, it's not a real deal and doesn't need to be confirmed. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 03/05/2001 01:36 PM
